title: Junior Resident Engineer - C&S
description:
Project: HDB at West district (BTO)

Job Description:

  • Provide standing supervision as and when directed by Consultant team.
  • Witness all inspections, testing and commissioning sessions performed by Sub-contractors to ensure compliance with quality standards, designs and specifications.
  • Compile relevant equipment, material, inspection and test certificated submitted by the contractors as required for the project records.
  • Ensure company's safety rule is complied with.
  • Resolve all site issues and ensure timely completion of the project.
  • Ensure all works are carried out in accordance to drawings and specifications.
  • Attend site meetings and perform site inspections.
  • Prepare weekly/monthly progress reports.
  • Any other task assigned from time to time.
  • Commencement of work February 2026.

Job Requirements:

  • Degree in Civil/Structural Engineering from a recognized university and registered with IES/ACES as a Resident Engineer
  • Minimum 3 years experiences as Resident Engineer in precast high rise residential building project.
  • Experience in building projects, experience in HDB projects will be an advantage.
  • Excellent interpersonal and communication skills
  • Preferably conversant with local codes and familiar with local authority’s regulations and requirements

Please submit your full resume, contact number(s), current & expected salary, copies of educational certificates and date of availability in your application

postedCompany.description:
BECA CARTER HOLLINGS & FERNER (S.E.ASIA) PTE LTD


Who we are

Beca Singapore office opened to support the evolving Buildings sector providing project management and engineering consultancy services to commercial building developers and industrial clients. Beca is one of Asia Pacific’s leading multidisciplinary consultancies and has operated in over 70 countries.

With around 3000 employees, our employee owned organisation has the diversity of experience and expertise to tackle major projects. We have over 95 years’ experience in successful client relationships, technical excellence & delivering award-winning project solutions.


About Beca

Our clients do incredible things every day. They are transforming their communities and changing lives through the structures they build, the products they manufacture, the services they provide, and the families they support. And we are right there alongside them. We are the problem-solvers – the thinkers, the creators, the planners and practitioners – who understand their vision and make things happen! We are 3000-plus professionals spread across 19 offices across the Asia Pacific.

While our experience has been 100 years in the making, it’s the fresh talent we’re nurturing, the innovative thinking we’re developing and the connections that we’re forging that get us most excited for the future.
